content:
I checked my log, Aisha was in the Pollux’s event and I overcame its “crazy” level with Aigis team. When it comes to Aisha I always have Madam Red to handle, sometimes this team with Aigis; but more often with the second team with Aqua. Maybe just go very quick

But maybe I’m just wrong too because none of the two teams are my major team. I created them only to beat Aisha. lol

The first team probably use the aigis cheese that I described, for the second, I didn't say that is impossible, just that it is frustrating, not interesting and more difficult compared to other fights just for her stat

the best strategies ive seen... mostly are cheese strats
aigis petrify, pierce to kill before 80% reduction, or castor corrosion
unfortunately most of the time it just ends up being use the cards so aisha doesnt get a bunch of str and just dps harder
doesnt help that 80% dmg reduc cuts dmg from poison and bleed twice (once the dmg that inflicts it and another on the actual bleed/poison tick)
Yeah, that is what I described, and even if that work, I say that is a bit of a shit design if only a incredibly specific couple of characters can do it better by just ignoring the boss gimmick
keeping cards in hand should amount to more dmg dealt imo
possible make it exponential, so one card isnt much but two stacks multiplicatively and so 3+ starts being good dmg
Yeah, so that they do a substantial reduction on her hp, that correctly scale depending on her max hp, for dtide etc
~~shes been nerfed 3 times now... about to be 4~~
The problem is not on her numbers, is the mechanics and possibly the card values
the problem did used to be on her numbers
she hit way harder before and phase 1 stacks much faster
now its just ok phase 1, mid phase 2 with a badly scaled mechanic
and less hp
Then they alleviated the problem but didn't fixed the core
yep

I’m sorry, I don’t use Aigis‘s stunning here, that’s just give too less damage. Aigis is mostly working on give the enemies “easily damaged” and make more embryos, exactly the same strategy with the second team without her, in most cases I have the second team to deal with Aisha, it’s just that in the event fight it requires lv. 70 under the STAR condition WHILE my team is only around lv. 60, which means I will lose tons of the possibility to against death, so I need Faint back to the picture. Also, Red herself produces embryos when the team got killed, so basically I fight by die more times, which is another strategy I love: just die, then win.

In the second team, Thais needs to give the enemy both “weak” and “easily damaged”, and this decreases the speed she makes embryos very much. So I got Faint to make the enemy weak and then Aigis to make them easily damaged, and everything makes Red more ,,, strong? . I didn’t bring Faint’s weapon here but if I did,  my strategy would work even better since the team died more than 3 times.

Either fight super quick or just die, I guess. I’m not saying it’s not annoying to fight Aisha, it’s just that it’s in fact very hard to lose…
The second team you use is for Dtide Alert 2?
sorry, the language barrier make it a bit harder to comprehend

Yes. They smoothly beat Aisha in Dtide when the suggested level is the same… I mean, if the system said “this fight is designed for team around level 60”, I use the second team with 2 aquas. But if it says “this fight is designed for a team around level 70”, then I use the team with Faint.
I don’t know a thing on English UI so my wording might be super strange, oops…

Alert 2 is a lot easier to beat whit a full lv60 team, but even then, idk, the fight boil down to burst it fast and then try burst it even more, there is a disconnect between what the state card mechanic may want you to do and what you normally do to beat it.
Even if is beatable, i just think is pretty poorly designed, and don't feel rewarding to beat it or encourage particular team compositions
I didn’t mean to say “…everything makes Red more attractive…” it’s a typo. I meant to say making her more… er… just strong. Offensive? I’m sorry I can’t not come up with the word,

I just use that card, because it just gives me so many STR. I mean… compared to the sacrifices it gives, the STR it gives is just more than enough when the team attacks mainly by multiple attacks… I sincerely see no problem with her. I created the Aqua & Red team only to beat Aisha, and then this team became my secondary major team, I use them whenever I need to end the fight super quick
Ofc since Aisha is the only boss I “created” a new team to beat, but since all other fight I used the same team, I think creating a new team only once throughout the whole story… is acceptable

Yeah, is ok to have a team that can use the extra STR well and use it for her, but idk if that extra str is enough to warrant that level of max hp discrepancy compared to other bosses.
Idk, maybe is not as bad as it seems, but i seen a lot of frustration by multiple players with her, if you try to beat her without cheesing in some way.

Another way to deal with Aisha is, according to the newly updated Faint buff under 2.0 circumstances (the STAR chapters): steal “humanoid” enemies’ extra strength, if combined this with any skills which could weaken Aisha, she would be much less offensive. Also, Aisha “prays”, so multi-attacks her would make her attacks dramatically less. However, although I’m not a fan of massive attacks, the only way I could beat Aisha is still kill her asap. I’d say she is a boss which requires specific ways to beat, which means teams which are possible to beat her is much less than other bosses.
I’m also willing to help if needed 🙂 plus my team which overcame 5-14 is relatively weak so I guess there won’t be a “but I don’t have this character with 3 stars” issue
